name: systemd-unit
description: Install OpenEnsemble as a system-wide systemd service so it starts on boot and respawns if it crashes. Uses bin/oe-supervise.mjs as ExecStart so a botched oe-admin change can be auto-reverted even when Node can't come up.

steps.stdin:
[Unit]
Description=OpenEnsemble
Documentation=https://github.com/OpenEnsemble/openensemble
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
User={{env.OE_USER}}
WorkingDirectory={{env.OE_BASE_DIR}}
ExecStart={{env.OE_NODE_BIN}} {{env.OE_SUPERVISE}}
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
KillMode=control-group
TimeoutStopSec=15
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
Environment=NODE_ENV=production

# Resource limits — generous for AI workloads, can be tuned later.
LimitNOFILE=65536

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
